Lead Info
Lead Source
: Web (inbound from blog post on adventure tourism marketing)
Lead Status
: Won
Estimated Budget
: $165,000 USD
Show Type
: Low count
Priority
: Medium
ADHOC Sales Contact
: David Rodriguez
Show Description
: 10-year anniversary celebration for Patagonia Adventure Co, performed over Lake Nahuel Huapi at sunset. Show themes: Andean peaks, lake reflections, wildlife (condors, pumas), and the brand's "explore responsibly" ethos. Intimate audience of brand partners and press.
Active Project
: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1aBcPatagoniaAdv2026/edit
Contract Info
Link to Upstream Contract
: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1xyzUpstreamPatagonia2026/edit
Link to Downstream Contracts
: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1xyzDownstreamPatagoniaPilots/edit, https://docs.google.com/document/d/1xyzDownstreamPatagoniaTransport/edit
Show Design Info
Assigned Design Lead
: Ben Mwangi
Map of Show Area
: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1mapPatagoniaShowArea/edit
Drone Count
: 200
Length of Show
: 9 minutes
Audio Plan
: Acoustic guitar performance by Argentine composer Ariel Ramírez Jr., delivered via Bluetooth speakers around the lakeside audience perimeter. No PA system to preserve natural setting.
Deliverable Timelines
: Locked 2026-04-15. On-site rehearsals 2026-05-15 to 2026-05-16.
Storyboards
: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1storyPatagoniaFinal/edit
Client Revisions
: 2 of 3 used
Event Details
On Site Date(s)
: 2026-05-15 to 2026-05-18
Testing and Performance Date(s)
: Testing 2026-05-15 dusk, 2026-05-16 dusk. Performance 2026-05-17 19:45 local (sunset)
ADHOC On-Site Producer
: Anna Schmidt
Pilot and CoPilot
: Captain Erik Hansen (PIC) and Captain Sara Kim (CoPilot), both with Verge Aerial - Verge Aerial holds the ANAC waiver
Support Hands
: 4 hands, ADHOC POC: Lila Nakamura, arrival 2026-05-14, departure 2026-05-19
Company Providing Drones/Batteries/Support Gear
: Verge Aerial (full gear package)
Transport Plan
: Ocean freight from Long Beach CA 2026-04-01, arrival Buenos Aires port 2026-04-25, ground transport 1,600km to Bariloche 2026-04-30 to 2026-05-02
Storage Plan
: On-site secure container at Llao Llao Resort property, fenced with local guard service Vigilancia del Sur
Map of Show Location
: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1mapPatagoniaLocationDetail/edit (launch barge on lake, 300m safety radius, no overflight of audience)
Permit Requirements and Timeline
Aviation Liability Insurance
: $5M coverage via AIG Argentina, policy AIG-2026-ARG-0445
FAA
: N/A - International venue. Argentine ANAC waiver ANAC-AR-2026-RN-0033 secured 2026-03-20
Pyrodrone Fire Marshal Permit
: Not applicable
Local Fire Department Notice
: Bomberos Voluntarios de Bariloche notified 2026-04-01, on-site presence confirmed for show night
Local Police Notice
: Policía de Río Negro notified 2026-04-05, traffic coordination plan reviewed
Venue Requirements
: Llao Llao Resort venue agreement signed 2026-02-15, includes 8-hour exclusivity window
City Requirements
: Municipal permit Bariloche EV-2026-0156 approved 2026-03-25
Gear List
Drones
: 200x Verge Aerial Stratus 200 (Verge Aerial)
Batteries
: 600x Verge LiPo 3300mAh packs (Verge Aerial)
Battery Chargers
: 12x Verge HexCharge 20-bay units (Verge Aerial)
Power Source for Battery Chargers
: 1x 30kW generator + grid hookup at venue (rented from local supplier La Plata Power)
Base Station
: 1x Verge CommandLite portable unit with backup (Verge Aerial)
Media Capture Plan
ADHOC Responsible Party
: Raj Kumar
Content Handoff Plan
: 4K master + Patagonia Adventure Co brand cutdowns (30s, 60s, 90s). Delivered via WeTransfer within 48 hours. No live broadcast — recorded only.
